term: Went Through All This Time and Effort
pronunciation: /wɛnt θru ɔl ðɪs taɪm ænd ˈɛfərt/
englishDefinitions: Spent a lot of time and energy doing something.
persianTranslation: این همه وقت و تلاش صرف کرد
examples: She went through all this time and effort to finish the project.
Why did you go through all this time and effort if you were not going to use it?
He went through all this time and effort to make dinner for everyone.
synonyms: spent a lot of time on
put a lot of effort into
